title: Frequency-Support Requirements for Assessing Direct Ocean-Induced Gravity Signals in Terrestrial Gravimetry
description: Reproducible code, version-controlled configurations, compact metrics, figures, manuscript and supplementary information for an evidence-based frequency-support audit of direct gravity signals from representative ocean mass-redistribution scenarios.
